mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tm_testquelib (id, questionTypeId, courseId, classroomId, unitId, content, title, difficultyLevel, differenceLevel, guesssLevel, status, creatorId, creator, createTime, codelang, libTypeId, libTypeName) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.questionTypeId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.classroomId}, #{item.unitId}, #{item.content}, #{item.title}, #{item.difficultyLevel}, #{item.differenceLevel}, #{item.guesssLevel}, #{item.status}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.codelang}, #{item.libTypeId}, #{item.libTypeName})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tm_testquelib WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT * FROM tm_testquelib WHERE courseId = #{courseId} AND status != 3 ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT count(1) FROM tm_testquelib WHERE courseId = #{courseId} AND status != 3
mapper.update:
UPDATE tm_testquelib SET status = 3 WHERE id IN
#{id}
